name: operaclinic-platform
description: OperaClinic monorepo - SaaS multi-tenant para clinicas de estetica

scripts.agent:gate:run:local: node scripts/run-agent-gate.mjs --base-url http://localhost:3001 --interval-minutes 15 --duration-hours 0 --failure-rate-threshold 0.05 --p95-threshold-ms 1500 --min-snapshots 3 --environment local-runtime-root --output-csv tmp/agent-readiness-local-root.csv --output-report tmp/agent-gate-local-root.md --validation-doc tmp/AGENT_GATE_LOCAL_VALIDATION.md
scripts.smoke:e2e: pnpm --filter @operaclinic/api prisma:seed && pnpm --filter @operaclinic/api smoke:e2e:seed && pnpm --filter @operaclinic/web smoke:e2e
